productDisplayName: ADIDAS Mumbai Indians Unisex Blue Match Cap
description: IPL caps are up for grabs! You know you have the Gods of cricket on your team - show your appreciation for their super-human efforts by wearing this Mumbai Indians match cap from adidas. Their motto is 'Play Like One' and you too can be part of that global team spirit which brings people together, defying all odds, to triumph at the highest level! Beat the heat in this cap as the cotton fabric and eyelets keep your head cool and dry all day. Team it with an adidas MI jersey to complete your sporty fashion statement during the IPL season. Made of 100% cotton Embroidered eyelets on the crown Embroidered brand name on the back, above the strap Mumbai Indians branding on the crown Adidas patented 3-Stripes in yellow on the visor Adjustable back strap Cap care Machine wash in cold water or hand wash separately Do not tumble dry, use softeners or bleach Line dry
